title: BulkIssuePropertyUpdateRequest
description: Bulk issue property update request details.

expression.description: EXPERIMENTAL. The Jira expression to calculate the value of the property. The value of the expression must be an object that can be converted to JSON, such as a number, boolean, string, list, or map. The context variables available to the expression are `issue` and `user`. Issues for which the expression returns a value whose JSON representation is longer than 32768 characters are ignored.

value.description: The value of the property. The value must be a [valid](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4627), non-empty JSON blob. The maximum length is 32768 characters.
